title: FabricProxyPlus
description: A re-implemented version of FabricProxy made to work on 1.21.+ and built from scratch to allow users to run bungee proxies and allow users to connect to their fabric servers through them.
body:
# FabricProxyPlus

**FabricProxyPlus** is a modern re-implementation of [FabricProxy](https://github.com/OKTW-Network/FabricProxy), built from scratch for Fabric servers behind a **BungeeCord** proxy.

It allows users to run this mod on their server, and allow incoming connections from a bungeecord proxy they have configured to let people join via that proxy. This is a updated version of FabricProxy, built from scratch that allows for the same function of the older mod but on minecraft versions 1.21+.

>This mod does **not** use any code from the original FabricProxy mod.

## Notice

- This mod only supports bungee, if you want velocity, I advise you checkout [FabricProxy-Lite](https://github.com/OKTW-Network/FabricProxy-Lite).

- I am lazy, so I probably won't update this for every version unless a lot of people use it
